---
name: "Content Correction / Typos"
about: Report a broken link, spelling issue, or outdated framework reference
title: "[FIX] Brief description of the issue"
labels: bug, documentation
assignees: gauravs19
---

## What is the problem?
_Describe the issue (e.g., "The link in Section 4.2 goes to a 404 page" or "The SaaS pricing model mentioned is heavily outdated")._

## Where is it located?
_Please link to the exact file or URL where the issue is found._

## Suggested Fix (Optional)
_If you know how to fix this, describe it here._

## Would you like to fix this yourself?
- [ ] Yes! I will submit a Pull Request.
- [ ] No, I'm just flagging it.
